## [00:00 - 03:02]

Before we get started, there's one thing that I want to say. So obviously this is about how to make more money from every email you send. So if you're a list owner, it's about getting more money out of one of your most valuable assets, like your email list. But I also think it's going to be very valuable for freelancers because it's going to allow you to give more value to your clients and then charge more and earn more money in less time probably. So yeah. So like Justin said, I met him in 2017 and he offered to mentor me. What he didn't mention was that I moved in with him and lived on his futon in a spare room which was probably about the size of this stage. And he also had 250 pound dogs in and out of there. So it was like the three of us in that tiny little room. Me writing emails every day. Yeah. Probably about six months after that, I got my first couple of clients online with email and just got started writing emails. And then Justin introduced me to Mark Stockman who's not here yet. Oh yeah, there he is back there. So I was used to working with clients who were like, yeah, just write a couple of emails and get them to me in two weeks or whatever. When I met Mark, he probably outlined eight emails that were very specific exactly what he wanted and he wanted them in the next like two days. So I was like, OK, this guy's serious. So was I. So we started writing. I was turning over a lot of copy really quickly and then Mark was testing it right away and then sharing a lot of the data with me so I was seeing what was working, what wasn't, and just getting a lot of experience really quickly. So like it says there, we sent over 268 million emails in 2018 and then 342 million emails last year and probably more than that this year. We do a lot of volume and then a lot of testing which allows us to see what's working and then try a bunch of different things. So a little background on Sherpa's email strategy, it's a bit different than say like Justin's email list or Stefan's where there's a lot of building relationships and eventually selling high ticket stuff. We work primarily with third party affiliates and then we mail their offers to a list of roughly one million people. It's 800,000 to one million on any given day. So we don't just send the email creatives that they give us. Instead we test literally everything in the email. So we optimize the copy, the subject line, the from names kind of in a three set process that I'm going to talk about today. And then one of the big things for us is that we don't focus on EPC or earnings per click which a lot of affiliates do. Instead we focus on PPM which is just the total revenue an email makes divided by a thousand emails sent. So that's the main metric that we use and that just drives most of our sales.
